Did not check for downstream consumers of 'null' values before changing to 0.0

Should also add progress update to phase-2-progress.md automatically
trace_id should reference benchmark run, but OK for now
Estimates are too coarse (HIGH/MEDIUM) - should use hours with error bars like '20 min +/- 5'
Parallelization is theoretical as single agent can't truly parallelize
Second-order risks could be more developed (only 1 sentence each)
Evaluation criteria could be quantified (1-5 scale) instead of qualitative labels

Retrospective is about Phase 2 execution process, not a specific 'failure event' as specified
Timeline estimates are approximate (not measured)
Pattern description could be more precise/scoped
Could include quantitative evidence (e.g., measured read times for JSON vs SQLite at various scales)
Some failures have corrupted JSON and couldn't be read -- 7 parse errors may skew cluster counts
